basic_details.job_title: City Civil Court Chennai Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 22 Posts
basic_details.short_information: City Civil Court Chennai has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 22 Data Entry Operator Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for Age Limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. (Computer Science) / B.Sc (IT) / BCA / B.E. (Computer Science) / M.Tech / M.Sc (IT)
qualification.details: Presently working/ousted 10(a)(i) staff from the Unit of City Civil Court, Chennai. B.Sc. (Computer Science) B.Sc (IT) BCA B.E. (Computer Science) M.Tech M.Sc (IT)

salary_details.details: Data Entry Operator: Rs. 20,000/- per month

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for Selection Process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for City Civil Court Chennai Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the City Civil Court Chennai Data Entry Operator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Data Entry Operator posts is 28th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Data Entry Operator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Data Entry Operator post will receive a consolidated pay of Rs. 20,000/- per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: To be eligible, candidates must have completed B.Sc. (Computer Science), B.Sc (IT), BCA, B.E. (Computer Science), M.Tech, or M.Sc (IT). Additionally, they must be presently working or ousted 10(a)(i) staff from the Unit of City Civil Court, Chennai.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for Data Entry Operators?
faq.answer: There are a total of 22 vacancies announced for the Data Entry Operator position in the City Civil Court Chennai recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly mention the age limit for this recruitment. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for any specific age criteria or relaxation details.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the City Civil Court Chennai Data Entry Operator recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 5643/1/E2/2026. This number should be used for reference when applying.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Data Entry Operator posts?
faq.answer: The Data Entry Operator positions are on a contract basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the City Civil Court Chennai located?
faq.answer: The City Civil Court Chennai is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. The recruitment is specifically for staff within this unit.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates should attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates with their application form.
